name: item-link
visual_summary: The item-link component is a small, clickable element that displays a brief text description. It is often used to represent a specific item or object in an application, such as a link to a product or a news article. When a user clicks or hovers over the component, it may display additional information or a loading animation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: item-link
Description: The item-link component is a small, clickable element that displays a brief text description. It is often used to represent a specific item or object in an application, such as a link to a product or a news article. When a user clicks or hovers over the component, it may display additional information or a loading animation.
Style: minimal, inline
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: item-link, link, item, clickable, interactive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
